attributes.name: The Village Square of Ashmoore
attributes.description: Cobblestones worn smooth by a hundred years of market-day boots radiate outward from a mossy stone well at the centre. A weathervane shaped like a rearing stallion creaks overhead. The smell of fresh bread drifts from somewhere eastward. To the north the clash of iron rings from a forge; to the west a painted sign swings above the inn. The road south leads out through the old gate.
